title: 『そこにあるのが,日常である』

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: U-um! Trainer? C-could you do me a favor?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: C-can you take a picture of me?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My family says they want to see what I'm like at
school...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've sent them plenty of pictures, but my little
sister keeps badgering me for more.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she's just making fun of me, so I want to
nail a really good shot of me that'll stop her
pestering! You've got to help me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't possibly refuse to help her after that, so we
start our impromptu photoshoot, hoping for the
perfect shot, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay, here I go! Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's a prop! I want to make it seem like I'm calmly
reading a book while impervious to all the chaos
around me!
choice_data_list: ...Do you always read books in the hallway?
...Do you always read books in the hallway?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
N-no... but I see stuff like this in magazines all the
time...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Is it too out of character for me? Okay, then how
about this?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Okay... Go ahead and take the picture. All right,
I've got this...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
This? It's coffee... I want to capture the image of
me casually hanging out and holding a cup of
coffee.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh? Uh... City...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I saw her in a magazine the other day, holding a
coffee in one hand and pushing her hair back with
the other. She looked so cool!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But I guess it doesn't quite fit my image, huh?
Hm...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
D-do you really think so? Hehe. I'll act natural,
then...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Wait. How do I normally act again? Is this right?
Or something like this?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seems like she's overthinking things and has
forgotten how to act naturally. I think of what we
can do to get her back to normal.
choice_data_list: Let's get some of your friends to join you.

Why don't you show your family how things are
directly?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah! As the saying goes, your true self
doesn't hide with a friend by your side!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well, I never thought I'd have a photoshoot
inside our classroom.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thanks for your help, Ardan and Yaeno!
choice_data_list: Okay, why don't you all try posing?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...How is this?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That's a very valiant pose, but it doesn't really
capture Chiyono O's personality.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
How about we take a picture of everyone sitting
together and taking notes? A display of
passionate studying is more true to her nature.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That would be truer to her character, but since
this is for her family, wouldn't it be better to take
a more lighthearted photo?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You have a point... I suppose we should do
something that embodies the spirit of "wahey,"
then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Helios often says that, and I believe it's a signal
that something fun is about to begin.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But wait—if it is a signal, then why does she
always say "wahey" multiple times in
conversation?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Pfft... Ahahaha! It's too funny watching you two
say "wahey" with completely straight faces!
Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Is it strange? I've also heard her exclaim things
like, "Wahey! We're besties for life!"

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Let's abandon this "wahey" idea for now. It's a
very Helios-specific concept and not one I think
we're able to embody just yet.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, concepts are a great idea! It's like the saying
goes, "the party can't start until the vibes walk
in!" Why don't we come up with our own version
of wahey?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
So in the end, are we still going along with the
wahey idea?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A natural smile blooms across Sakura Chiyono O's
face, and I take the opportunity to snap a picture
of her chatting with her friends.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Did you see the picture? Hehe. Aren't my friends
great? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, she sends the picture to her family,
and I overhear her happily telling them about her
school life.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! Do you mean like... have a video call
with them?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I don't know... We haven't talked lately... I'm not
sure if that'll go well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Sakura Chiyono O is too reluctant to do it, I
take her phone to show her family exactly what
she's like at the academy instead.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ack! Wait, why is everyone on the call?!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Younger Sister
text_block_list.text:
You were the one who suddenly said you were
gonna start a video call, so of course we wanna
see what's up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?! You're the ones who told me on LANE yesterday that you wanted to see me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So what do you think? Go ahead and soak in the
sight of your big sister at Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Second Oldest Brother
text_block_list.text: Are you really at Tracen Academy, though? I bet you're just lying to us!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Excuse you! I picked a spot with nobody around
because I'm considerate like that! I really am at
Tracen right now!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Oldest Brother
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Well, come on. Show us around. I wanna
see what the place is like.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Uh... Is it okay if we walk around, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Younger Sister
text_block_list.text:
What?! Your trainer's there?! No way! I wanna see
what your trainer's like!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Do you even care about me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O's call with her siblings
continues on for a long while.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My little sister is just terrible! She took a bunch of
screenshots of me during our video call last night
and sent them to me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Except they're all of me with my eyes half-closed
or making weird faces! Ugh, she used to be so
cute, but now she's a little brat!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And my second-oldest brother kept teasing me
too. Honestly, the only person on my side is my
oldest brother!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But despite all her complaints, Sakura Chiyono O
still looks extremely happy.
